name: convos-hermes-runtime
description: Convos agent runtime powered by Hermes agent

scripts.start:hermes: sh scripts/keys.sh && sh scripts/install-deps.sh && sh scripts/apply-config.sh && sh scripts/identity.sh && sh scripts/start.sh
scripts.eval: EVAL_RUNTIME=hermes sh $([ -f evals/eval.sh ] && echo evals/eval.sh || echo ../evals/eval.sh)
